allow:
Bash(gh pr create --base main --title "Add governance spine hardening" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary

- **Default audit redaction**: `AuditLedger` now applies `DEFAULT_REDACTION_CONFIG` by default, preventing PII from leaking into audit storage
- **Production auth guard**: Logs an error when `API_KEYS` is empty in production, making the security gap visible
- **Audit before execution**: Records `action.executing` entry before cartridge call, ensuring audit trail even if execution crashes
- **Missing audit events**: Adds `action.expired` and `action.undo_requested` entries for approval expiry and undo paths
- **Enriched audit snapshots**: `propose\(\)` audit entries now include `riskScore`, `riskCategory`, and `matchedChecks`
- **Patch re-evaluation**: Re-runs the policy engine after parameter patching to prevent policy bypass via patched parameters
- **Hash chain integrity**: Uses `json-canonicalize` \(RFC 8785\) in the sync hash path; `verifyChain\(\)` now recomputes hashes to detect data tampering
- **Governance profiles**: Adds `observe`/`guarded`/`strict`/`locked` named profiles with preset risk tolerances and spend limits; observe mode auto-approves while preserving full decision trace; locked mode requires mandatory approval for all risk levels

## Test plan

- [x] All 474 existing + new tests pass \(`npx vitest run`\)
- [x] `packages/schemas` compiles cleanly
- [x] `packages/core` compiles cleanly
- [x] `apps/api` compiles cleanly
- [x] Existing `DelegationRule` without `maxChainDepth` still works \(backward compat\)
- [x] Existing `IdentitySpec` without `governanceProfile` still works \(backward compat\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(npx next lint --file src/app/page.tsx --file src/app/mission/page.tsx --file src/app/approvals/page.tsx --file src/app/activity/page.tsx --file src/app/team/page.tsx --file src/components/character/operator-character.tsx --file src/components/layout/shell.tsx --file src/components/layout/app-shell.tsx)
Bash(npx next lint --file src/app/page.tsx --file src/providers/query-provider.tsx --file src/hooks/use-approvals.ts --file src/hooks/use-agents.ts)
